reviews.comment:
Estación de Servicio y club de automovilistas elitista que cobra un precio inaccesible para el que realmente lo necesita

(Translated by Google)
An elite gas station and motoring club that charges an inaccessible price for those who really need it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRN0t1ZmJREAE

reviews.comment:
Solité ser socio,vía internet,nunca repondieron a pesar de que lo harían dentro de las 48 horas siguientes
Hoy, llamó para reclamar y me dejan esperando sin atender por más de 10 minutos cada llamada, sin éxito
Espero sean tan eficientes como propagan.
Gracias

(Translated by Google)
I applied to become a member online, but they never responded, even though they said they would within 48 hours. Today, I called to complain and they left me on hold for more than 10 minutes each time, without getting through. I hope they're as efficient as they advertise.

Thank you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnem9xMzFnRRAB
